name: aria-desktop
description: Aria Desktop app assembly and host wrapper over the @aria/desktop shell seam

scripts.build:host: bun build ./src/electron-main.ts --outfile ./dist/electron-main.js --target node --external electron && bun build ./src/electron-preload.ts --outfile ./dist/electron-preload.cjs --target node --format cjs --external electron
scripts.build: bun run build:renderer && bun run build:host
scripts.smoke:build: bun run build && bun -e "for (const path of ['./dist/electron-main.js', './dist/electron-preload.cjs', './dist/renderer/index.html']) { if (!(await Bun.file(path).exists())) throw new Error('Missing ' + path) }"
scripts.dist:mac: bun run build && bunx electron-builder --config ./electron-builder.json --mac dmg zip
scripts.dist:linux: bun run build && bunx electron-builder --config ./electron-builder.json --linux AppImage zip
scripts.dist:win: bun run build && bunx electron-builder --config ./electron-builder.json --win nsis zip
